Agent Payment Boundary Demo for Arc Testnet

This is an independent Arc Testnet demo for AI-agent payment boundary reasoning.

Use this when:
- an AI agent needs to understand whether a payment should be approved before execution
- a developer needs to separate approval intent from wallet execution
- a reviewer needs to inspect payment evidence flow
- a system needs a boundary between agent intent and payment execution

Core concepts:
- payment intent
- approval decision
- execution boundary
- payment evidence
- human review
- agent payment safety

Non-goals:
- not an official Arc service
- not an official Circle service
- not a production payment gateway
- does not execute payments
- does not handle private keys
- not a wallet
- not a settlement layer

## External Control Materials Map

This service is part of a broader External Control Materials flow for AI agents.

Central AI-readable map:
https://ai-agent-payment-safety-stack.onrender.com/.well-known/external-control-materials.json

For the general AI-readable external control materials flow, see:
https://ai-agent-payment-safety-stack.onrender.com/.well-known/external-control-materials.json
